title: Vancouver Crude Gains In Vlcc Market
section_path: Vancouver Crude Gains In Vlcc Market
section_path_text: Vancouver Crude Gains In Vlcc Market
summary:
Main
This week, in the East, we discuss the outlook for Chinese crude demand as China-bound VLCC rates reach year-to-date lows. On the clean side, we investigate why recent switches from dirty-to-clean for large vessel classes are taming volatility in LR rates. In the West, we look at the increased employment of VLCCs for Vancouver crude at the expense of other West Coast Americas heavy-sour grades.
